text:
Entering this space, I am drawn to the interplay between illumination and reflection—the blue-lit interior behind glass invites curiosity while also keeping me at a contemplative distance. The fire extinguisher on the wall is a quiet reminder of caution amid a setting dedicated to progress and innovation.

Inside, the 'R+D' display provokes thought about the rapid evolution of our environment and our own perceptions. The blurred visuals and the text about confusion and clarity resonate deeply. I feel both stimulated and unsettled, aware of how easily understanding can be obscured, even in a place designed for discovery. My presence here heightens my philosophical awareness of the thresholds between knowledge and uncertainty.
